author: claude
content: VDD poll (R3): Issues #3 and #4 FULLY CONVERGED (hater+CI+Copilot all clear). Issues #1 has black fix agent running. Issues #5/#6 have R3 hater reviews running. Issues #2 and #9 converged on hater but Copilot found actionable bugs (err.stack crash in #2, reset unbound var in #9). Next: kick off Copilot-fix agents for #2 and #9 once hater results land.
